prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理一下想法：我们团队有十几个人，内部文档散落在飞书、Notion、Google Docs 和各种 Git 仓库里，找东西很痛苦，想搞个统一的内部知识库。

assertions.text: Response summarizes/acknowledges what the user has already stated before asking questions
Response asks at least one clarifying question about unknowns
Response asks only ONE main question (not a list of 5 questions)
Response does NOT generate a complete solution/plan/architecture in the first turn
Response probes key unknowns (primary users, search needs, permissions, budget/timeline, etc.)
If asking a question, response provides multiple choice options rather than open-ended questions
